reviews.review_description: I play drums in real life and when I bought this game, I thought it would be helpful. But when I picked a somg from the dlc i got, it was extremely out of sync, the height of everything was off, the graphics felt like they were on a 2 dollar budget, and made overall made me feel disgusted. And when i tried to refund it, it didnt work. If you wanna throw $20 down the drain, go for it, but I’m never making this mistake again

This game is TERRIBLE when it comes to registering stick location. Move too fast and you miss the notes. Need to hit the sticks together? You better make sure the exact middle of the sticks hit or you'll miss the note. Reaching out to hit the cymbals? Yeah, you'll probably get a wrong note when it decides the drum below and in front was hit instead. For the love of God, do not waste your money on this trash

developer_response.body:
Hey there,

Sorry to hear you're having trouble with the tracking. Precision is everything in Drums Rock, so we get why this is frustrating.

What you’re describing usually happens due to drum positioning or VR tracking issues during fast movements. Please try going into the settings and re-calibrating your drum layout—you can manually adjust the height and angle of the cymbals and drums so you don't hit the lower ones by mistake. Also, make sure your room's lighting is optimal so your headset doesn't lose the controllers when you move fast.

We are constantly tweaking hitboxes based on feedback. If you still face issues after adjusting the layout, jump into our Discord and we'll help you fix your setup.

Hope you give it another shot!

reviews.review_description:
First off, the drums are ALWAYS in the wrong place when I load in. I shouldn't have to do admin every time I have a spare half hour to play. Then changing the positioning blocks the menus.

Nice you change from the horrific bat things, but why do the notes come at such a high angle? Who plays the drums looking up?

I bought this as I couldn't resist the sale price to play Greenday and Lit. But that's about it.

Smash Drums ticks every box this doesn't. It's as if the devs haven't played the game. Grab it on sale for the great DLC.
It is amazing I love the game but owner PLEASE add MORE GREEN DAY songs

It should be just like Rockband; the more you increase the difficulty the more 1:1 it should be to the actual drum track to the song (minus pedal work obv). 

Instead the higher difficulties have you doing weird cross ups that make no sense to the song's drum track just to be difficult

developer_response.body: Hey Rocker, that's right, the higher the difficulty, the more accurate it is, because it gets closer to the notes. But you have to play on a difficulty level that suits your current abilities. I hope with practice you'll be able to appreciate it better.

reviews.review_description: This needs a Metallica DLC everyone would love it if you added Metallica especially enter sandman PLEASE ADD METALLICA!

I was hoping for a new drumming game, but the drums feel more like a tool to be used in an arcade game.

It's awkward to play for a couple of reasons. There's something odd with the synchronisation. Some notes are out of time, others on time. It'll punish you for 'missing' some hits that are right on the line and treated as perfect other times.

Two of the drums have an almost identical colour which makes for confused signalling in the midst of a complex routine.

Rather than scrolling notes you're faced with a bunch of flying demons. In itself not problematic but the steep angle at which they come in and the height of the line makes for uncomfortable body position as it feels like you're always having to look up rather than more naturally out in front.

Drum positioning is welcome but it's a fine balance and phantom hits were sometimes recorded during times when I wasn't aiming for a drum.

Overall I was never fully comfortable playing it. Many of the built in songs aren't great and some are covers, and I considered whether it was worth sticking with it. Having seen other reviews mention custom songs that gave me a bit of hope. The custom section is hidden in amongst the challenge menu, it's completely blank and has no feedback. So I Googled it and it just sounds like a massive chore which wouldn't be worth it for a game I'm not even convinced by.

It's not awful, it sort of mostly works, but I would say it is an acquired taste that just isn't what I was looking for.

reviews.review_title: Not bad, but not what I was looking for
reviews.review_description:
I came to this game from Smash Drums which I use as an exercise game. I was hoping to find a similar game with different songs to give me greater variety. I quickly found that this game with its emphasis on sitting facing a single direction isn't quite what I had hoped for.
Still, I really enjoy the drums, so I decided to play through.
The good: AR looks fantastic on this game, as does the environment if you choose to go full VR. Since it's a seated game, it's closer to the actual experience of playing drums than something like Smash Drums. Song selection looks great.
The bad: At least some of the songs are poor cover versions. As a result if you play for the "feel" of playing, it misses the mark. Rather than an epic rock journey through hell you're going to feel like you're in your garage with your friends in high school, pretending. 
The weird: I don't know what the point of the mechanic of making me grab and hold the sticks is. There might be a mechanic later in the game where you throw the sticks at something, but it seemed weird to not just put them into my hands.
It's not a bad game. I genuinely stared at the giant rock fireballs flying over my head in amazement. Grab it if you want a silly drumming game.

reviews.review_title: Needs a a couple of things…
reviews.review_description: This is by far my favorite game, and I’ve been playing vr for 5 years now. I love how the game just sparks into life with the MR setting and the jump between the hard difficulty and expert difficulty is insane! This is probably the only vr drum game I actually enjoy! Though it does need a couple of things. The old design for the demons looked really good, so there should be a setting for that. Also there should be a lot more classic rock and metal rock songs like Iron Man. Also when you need to play the drums quickly like the large demons in Obey, the drums don’t really respond when you hit them. Overall, it’s a great game!

This game gets more of my playtime than Smash Drums due to the ability to add custom songs. However, its implementation needs some optimization. I currently have over 600 custom songs added which causes the song selection list to lag quite a bit. Scrolling through the list is a chore, as there is no way to quickly jump further down the list using the sliding bar. If you try and scroll too fast, the game starts to lag harder until it freezes and requires a headset restart. A search function would help quickly find the song I'm looking for instead of scrolling slowly in the hopes it doesn't crash. Also, my 600+ custom songs can be reduced down to 150 if the difficulty levels for each song can be consolidated into one entry, just like the built-in songs. Right now, each difficulty per custom song is treated as a single entry which greatly inflates the list, and is probably contributing to the lag.

Other than that, I'm really enjoying the game. It gives you a great workout on the higher difficulities and I find there's more variety in genres than its closest competitor.

I bought the undertale dlc to only get 2 songs and the game is just overall wack like bro the drums never spawn in the right place 
Glad I can refund this

I’m honestly enjoying this one especially for the price to buy it. I’ve downloaded other games for around the same price and 9/10 have missed the mark. I’m sure real drummers have negative things to say but if you’re playing just for fun or to discover new music this is it. 
I wholehearted only have one negative thing to say, I do wish they had more songs from bands like A Day To Remember, Lorna Shore, Bring me The Horizon and Metallica or a lot of early 2000s bands (just examples) but then again that’s just my personal preference. Still would love to see that though
Great game but I find that the ride cymbal doesn’t register half the time I hit it
Love this Game, but it's a Pain... to scroll down my library of Custom Songs. All unsorted, please Dev's add at least a searchbar.
Good original soundtrack and some other good songs. Great dlc for specific songs and collections, they are still adding new ones every couple of months
Need to get more songs would love some 3 doors down breaking Benjamin DragonForce loads more

reviews.review_title: Fun game, it has cyber punk
reviews.review_description: The cyber punk pack made me really enjoy the game. I love how I can change the way the game looks in the settings in case I don’t want to see the little demon boys I can see the little icons. One thing I hope they add is a dynamic difficulty so the game adapts as you play like in rocksmith or in other games. Something so you feel like you grow.
Hello, I really hope that the developer will answer me. I'm giving it 4 stars because the drum volume is too low. Please help me increase it.

When I bought this game, I expected to play it for an hour then put it away for when friends visited, but I was so wrong!

This is a fantastic game that also gives you one heckuva upper body workout AND tests your coordination and reactions too. As someone who’s physically disabled I’m very limited as to what exercise I can do that involves my back and lower half of my body, but since I bought the Quest I’ve found a few apps and games I can exercise safely in - Beat Sabre, This, Dragon Fist Kung Fu, Les Mills Body Combat, X Fitness and Power VR. All offer just upper body workouts or the ability to customise the exercise and take out things you can’t do.

Drums Rock has taught me I can ‘Air Drum’ and work up one hell of a sweat doing so. I’m not a big metal fan, but I don’t think you need to be to really enjoy the challenge this game presents.
This game is so much fun to play and has amazing songs

The game is good and the music is too but it does get very hard and I was too hard for me so I went to refund it but it said I either played it for 2 hours or had it for 14 day but I only got in the 3rd of August and it’s now the 6th and I definitely didn’t play it for more than 2 hours now I can’t buy newtons playground

Ive been trying to find a game to buy that looks fun and i saw this game about drums, i like rock music so i decided to try the free trial and i got obsessed with the game, ive completed the campaign under 3 days because of how much time ive spent on it. Buy this game its super fun.

reviews.review_title: Good but needs Internet to play dlcs
reviews.review_description:
It's alright and being the same company as Guitar Hero, it brings such nostalgia to my punk rock side. The downside is needing the Internet to play the DLCs you have purchased. Idk if it's on my end but I bought like 3 DLC packs and wanted to play with them without needing wifi but sadly they're locked even though you have bought them. 
I tried countless times to play the DLCs but couldn't so I don't understand why they're locked under needing wifi while the free songs you can play. I even downloaded some custom songs and they're playable without needing Internet so why do the DLCs need to be locked? Even if you buy Undertale DLC which gives you the drums, background, and drumstick themes, they are too locked under Internet. So maybe they need to find out why this is happening. 
Heck I play and bought DLC packs from Beat Saber and they're still playable without needing wifi. 
I'm just mad because sometimes I don't have Internet access wherever I go and I just want to play the songs I BOUGHT 😭😭😭😭

reviews.review_title: Where are the add on packs?
reviews.review_description:
Purchased 2 of the add on packs. It says I have them downloaded but they are no where to be found? What am I doing wrong? How do you get them to appear?

Otherwise love the game.

developer_response.body: Hello Rocker, if you are playing on an Oculus Quest 1 that is not available, you can send an email to info@garage51.es and we will help you better

reviews.review_description: I got this game because I play drums and I thought it would be boring and non-challenging but I was wrong. I thought the mechanics on the game were phenomenal like flipping the drum sticks, and buying different things for the drums. I also thought that the songs would be from a random band that you don’t know and the prices would be through the roof, but one again I was wrong lol

Been playing for several hours and it's both fun and challenging. Gives me a hormonal high and I'm losing weight without trying; you work up a sweat! My only criticism would be not enough ad-ons for more of a personal music taste.

reviews.review_title: Very fun and addictive VR game!
reviews.review_description: I bought this game a while ago and it is definitely worth trying out! The game is easy to learn, but difficult to master. My only problem with this game is that some times the DLC bundles have a limited amount of songs. It would be really cool if the devs released a Guilty Gear Strive DLC! It has one of the best video game soundtracks out there.

Sale went on, then i was just going to download the demo if there was one but instead when i scrolled down i saw anime songs, welp, didnt hesitate to get it. 

I hope they have more anime songs and maybe some shows or movies. Multiplayer would be nice too.

The game plays well besides a bit of tracking issues every so often. But what's holding this game back if the transactions for almost all the songs even with the "deluxe version" you get a small list of songs and have to pay so much more for all the others.

reviews.review_title: Seriously just buy it don't bother tryin
reviews.review_description: This is my 1st real review of any game and I can't tell you how much fun this is. I've tried and bought several other style games and this is by far the best one. The included music is amazing and the road map looks good for the future. Tricked my wife into trying it and she bought is before the 20 minute trail ran out lol
I bout the dlc and it didint give it to me this is trash

developer_response.body:
Hi ford0_0,

We’re really sorry to hear that you didn’t receive your DLC. Could you let us know if you’re using the Oculus 1 version? Some versions appear in the store but aren’t available, and in that case, we can help you request a refund.

Thanks for your patience,
The Drums Rock Team

reviews.review_title: LITERALLY THE BEST DRUM GAME OUT😩
reviews.review_description: I’m beyond pleased with this game. It’s exactly what I’ve been looking for in a drumming game. It’s immersive and fun and makes me feel great. Alsooo PLEASEEE add more known bands/songs like Jinjer, Bad Omens, Breaking Benjamin, Boundaries, Etc. PLEASE

I’ve had this game for like 2 months honestly amazing it’s fun and very creative concept and not to mention the DLC’s they are freaking incredible I have gotten the undertale one and bought some of the songs separately and honestly fire and the boss fights are so cool 10/10 game would HIGHLY recommend to any new vr players

reviews.review_title: Only two things I find wrong
reviews.review_description: I didn’t know how to do a charged hit until the third act in the campaign because it wasn’t in the tutorial and the tips go by so quick I could barely read them, and in being me to life it might have been a glitch only for me but it happened every time for me on the campaign, it had a challenge where you had to get less than five hits and on one of the red note sections close to the start of the song it wouldn’t count them to the hits so I would end up getting close to failing the challenge at the start other than that it’s a great game

Awesome game I recommend it to anyone who is looking into purchasing the game I’m giving four stars and will change to five stars once we get some slipknot , Black Sabbath, ozzy osbourne thank you to the developers of this game for such an amazing game can’t stop playing it

developer_response.body: Hi Rocker, we really appreciate your requests. But in order to achieve them, it helps us a lot to get as many points as possible ;) I hope you continue enjoying Drums Rock and the upcoming DLCs

reviews.review_title: This is what VR is all about.
reviews.review_description: Best drum sim I’ve ever played. Solid starting library for any millennial to rock out with. I never write reviews but this game has given me so much fun and joy I have to show some love.

reviews.review_title: My opinion on the game and suggestions
reviews.review_description: Thi s game is the pefect drum game in my opinion. I like to turn off the demons so there just flat notes so its a little less overwhelming. As far as level design I love it. I would love to see some more environments in a future update someday. Inwould also love to see some avenge sevenfold and some korn would be awesome. And it would be frickin cool as heck if you could get some like actual drumkits and sticks added to the shops like yamaha or pearl export.

reviews.review_title: I just wish there were more metal songs!
reviews.review_description:
The selection is limited, even buying packs.... I want to try Lars Ulrich from Metallica! Proper rock drum gods! A bit of Iron Maiden and Black Sabbath would be good too.... It's the most realistic rock experience on VR and I WANT MOOOORE!!!!! I will update rating if I get MOOOOOORE! HUH (metal style HUH). 

(Star rating raised as developer has promised more content on the way 🤘)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your enthusiasm and suggestions! 🤘 We totally understand your passion for the legends of rock and metal. While we can’t reveal anything just yet, we can promise you that we’re always working on new content that pays tribute to the greats. Exciting packs are on the way that will definitely surprise you and bring out that 'metal style HUH' on the drums. Keep rocking, and if you're loving the game, we'd really appreciate it if you updated your rating to 5 stars! 🥁🔥

reviews.review_description: This game is awsome 👌  I love playing this with my friend and this review is just to get a free cosmetic but it is amazing  get this game it is so much fun
i thought it would be fun but most good songs are paid and as a real drummer it was really bad

developer_response.body:
Hi ricksanchez4.6,

Thanks for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that your experience wasn’t what you expected. While some songs are paid to support the artists and keep the game running, we’re constantly adding new content and free tracks to give everyone more options.

We really appreciate your input as a drummer—it helps us improve the gameplay and make it more satisfying for players like you. We hope you’ll give future updates a try!

Best,
The Drums Rock Team

reviews.review_description:
This game is really good,
but I wish there was multiplayer
This game is the first game that doesn't glitch atleast for me at all they should add avenged sevenfold songs that would make this so much better

Only reason I gave four stars is there’s not enough rock songs to purchase, Disturbed, Pantera, Offspring, Lit, Green day all amazing!! Would love to see more available to purchase, blink 182, Linkin park, Korn, slipknot, Rise Against, Pearl Jam, Chris Cornel, Clutch, Less than Jake, Shinedown, Artic Monkeys, Fear factory…. Just to name a few :-)

Had to update to 5 stars! But please put out more original and awesome songs as suggested above…

This game is so much fun! Months on and it’s still my number one game I go to. Just released Linkin Park songs so I’m very happy with that! 

An Avenged sevenfold compilation as someone else mentioned would be incredible! Or Rise Against! 

10/10

I was hoping to find another VR game that was at least as fun as Beat Saber and finally! It’s here! I played until the battery in the headset ran down last night.. I never did that before.

The game had a very guitar hero feel to it and I was a huge GH fan back in the day. If you’re a rocker the tunes are good and enough variety to keep you interested.

Love that you can position the drums around to make things comfortable. I found that some tracks performed better when moving the cymbals closer or further away 

So far I’ve only played normal difficulty and at time it still kicks my butt. So far very comfortable and responsive game play. Looking forward to running my battery down again tonight! Awesome fun game, thanks for making this! \m/

My only recommendation is to add more metal songs. Make like a heavy hitters pack with some deicide some cannibal corpse some crowbar some Metallica some slayer get a giant metal pack charge like 10 bucks and I’ll gladly buy it.

reviews.review_title: This game is a waste of my money
reviews.review_description: Terrible.just one word

No lie, extreme difficulty is super unplayable on the quest considering I've got a S on every hard song but can't even find the groove of extreme.. hard is fun but im putting the game down till more DLC already hit my S goal on them all.
Fun game to play..the more i play it the better it gets...i wish i knew how to add custom songs tho...people in the discord talk about how to do it..but i have no clue how to do it
I absolutely love it, but wish there were more heavy metal or classic rock. Iron maiden, Metallica, Slayer, or even 80 glam bands like motley Crue, poison etc.
It is awesome they have my favorite song i love rock and roll but could we get some Black Sabbath? Or nirvana?
Game is great, but we need more songs playing by great drummers like dave lombardo from slayer, joey jordison from slipknot or more pantera tracks to feel like vinnie paul :)

im having fun.
great diversely choosen dlcs too:)

reviews.review_title: Fantastic 5 star game with one caveat.
reviews.review_description:
The thing that makes this game great is that it's uncomplicated and very very fun to play. I find myself standing there trying to decide what game I'm going to play for short stint. It usually turns out to be Drums Rock. 

I don't know if the developers ever read these reviews, but here's my suggestion. Frankly, some of the tunes that come with the game are kind of weak and heavy metal gets old and irritating quickly. 

You really need to come out with some more DLCs that are 80s and 90s Alternative Rock.  Music that gets into your head and you find yourself humming it to yourself all day long. Bands like Cheap Trick, The Romantics, Blink 182, Billy Idol, The Offspring, Def Leppard, Bon Jovi, Tom Petty, REO Speedwagon, AC/DC, Foo Fighters, The Psychedelic Furs, Live, Third Eye Blind. That music is melodic, has great beats, is actually fun to listen to, with innovative and talented artists. Pay the royalties and set your game apart from the rest.
Reminds me of LEDGENDS OF ROCK, if it had the same music playlist it would be the only thing I play!

reviews.review_title: Wish there were more Green Day songs
reviews.review_description:
Great game. 
Bought it because of the Green Day dlc.
Needs more Green Day tracks

I just got a quest from a friend, and after trying beat saber, I wanted something a bit more rock n roll, and man, after trying the demo, I had to buy it. It did not disappoint. They also have music from cyberpunk, undertale, and blasphemous!
It’s a fun game, I like the feel of it
Doesn’t register the hits right. Mistakes one drum for another. Bad development. Bad developers.

developer_response.body: Hello Rocker, what you're saying is very strange since many players would not be able to complete the extreme difficulty as they do. We would like to investigate your problem further, could you send us an email to info@garage51.es with more details? and if you could review your review while we look at what happened. Thank you very much!

reviews.review_description:
Awsome songs to play, "your Lilly," is my favorite. 
If "buried alive" by avenged sevenfold was an option, and some linkin park was there, i would give 6 stars if possible.
I purchased the game and decided I liked the DLC songs and so I upgraded to the ultimate pack and it gave me some of the DLC but not others. Linkin park, disturbed are not included or what?

reviews.review_title: Can't unlock the songs after purchasing
reviews.review_description: Can't unlock the songs after PURCHASING, also lost all the saves after reinstall the game. Can anybody help? Thank you very much.

developer_response.body: We’re sorry to hear about the issues you're experiencing. It’s not normal for purchases or saves to be lost. Restarting your device and ensuring the game is updated to the latest version should usually resolve this. If the problem persists after trying these steps, please reach out to us at info@garage51.es, and we’ll be happy to help. Thanks for your patience!

reviews.review_title: Drum hit zones a bit buggy
reviews.review_description: Im coming from Ragnarock and the levels here are super simple (fine for the beginning of course!) but I’m still missing many notes, especially of the highheads. I assume the stick sometimes goes through them if you hit it on the edge (like you would do with a real drum) which is super annoying for me.

developer_response.body: Hi Rockero, the difficulty is adapted, especially in the campaign, and as is evident in lower difficulties there is less note and sense of rhythm. If you activate the + difficulty in the campaign it will be more difficult. And on the other hand, I recommend that you configure the drums to avoid hitting in unwanted places. And if you could review your review, since as a small studio that affects us quite a bit.

reviews.review_description: I’ve been a drummer for 7 years this game is so untimed everything is off beat Even if you hit perfect the drums are set up stupid and when you change it it’s unplayable would not recommend and would give it a 0

developer_response.body: Hi, I'm sorry you're having trouble, the game is set up to go with the music, if you have any issues we can help you resolve them if you send an email to info@garage51.es. And if you could review your review it would help us a lot as a small team.

reviews.review_description: Waste of money.  No demo available so I didn’t know how trash it was till after purchase.  Doesn’t even come close to actual drum playing.  Time signatures not even close.

developer_response.body: Hi Rocker! I'm sorry you had a bad experience, the beats are accurate, you just need to keep learning to keep up, or if you have trouble on the physical level, adapting the drums to real space. I hope you could check out your review, we are a studio trying to get ahead, and a lot of people enjoy the game.

reviews.review_description: Piece of trash lazily made game. Drums are always off despite readjusting. Forced to do the tutorial with the drums all the way in the ground. When I raise the drums up they cover parts of the menu, have to walk around them to click on campaign or whatever. These good reviews must be fake and posted by associates of the company to boost their rating when it's a complete mess of a game. And hitting notes doesn't even work, I KNOW I hit it, I'll watch the stick hit the drum or symbol and just won't register even if the timing is perfect. Obviously off. Refunding, y'all can keep it.

developer_response.body: Hello, Rocker, as you can deduce, since it is a game from the official store, what you are mentioning is impossible to happen, otherwise it could not have launch. What you mentions is that the floor configuration of your headset is not adjusted properly. I recommend that you set the floor well and re-enter the game. And if you can adjust your review to reality, we would appreciate it since we are a small studio and that has a lot of influence.

reviews.review_title: Such a fun game! Great job devs!
reviews.review_description: If you love guitar hero but with drums then you NEED to get this game. Love the implementation of the music while also fighting demons to the beat of the drums. Excellent track list and so many songs to play through and many more to unlock as you're playing through the campaign. My ONLY complaint about this game is I see a section for custom songs but there's no guide on how to add them. Hopefully it's something that will get addressed soon because once I can add my own songs I will never leave this game lol. Highly recommend. Go buy it.. NOW

reviews.review_title: I CANNOT get this game to work.
reviews.review_description: I've restarted my quest 3 multiple times, deleted and reinstalled the game multiple times. No matter what I do I cannot get anything on the left controller to work in game except for the motion so I can't press the play button. Like what the heck?

developer_response.body: Hello Rocker, we are sorry that you have had problems, if you send an email to info@garage51.es we can help you, it is probably something technical about the Quest 3 and not the game. If you could review your review we would appreciate it since that affects us a lot as a small studio.

reviews.review_title: Reminds me of guitar hero days
reviews.review_description: First game on oculus ive actually loved. Been playing this consistently for like 3 days. I’m able to complete some hard but mostly still on medium. Definitely a challenge and a good arm workout. Looking forward to updates. Possibly able to battle others online and leaderboards etc.
Was cool to see but kinda sucked, couldn’t get the drum set to stay in one spot.

developer_response.body: Hello Rocker, there must be something wrong with your floor configuration, but the drums always stay in the same place. If I could review it, that would influence a small studio like us.

reviews.review_description: Guitar Hero/Rock Band without spending all the money on getting the whole setup.
They need to put this game in the meta quest store pls

Drums Rock is such a good game. I'm having a really good time playing it and the new real songs are simply spectacular! The only thing I think the game has to improve is in fanct this lack of real songs, but to obtain the licenses is difficult and the developers are working on it, so they will add more songs in the future. Buy it! It's very fun.

reviews.review_title: kind of like it. still worth 5 stars
reviews.review_description:
Update
Thanks devs for reply.
Didn't mean to look a whinny tawt about songs lol

 like the gameplay and it is a 5 star game for sure.

Not my favourite drumming game, but that is just a preference for the hit points being different. But will put in lots of practice with this for sure.

Don't known any of the songs so far as I have played.  I'm a old rocker so not a problem.
Just wish there had more songs to play from the start without needing to open others. I know pratice makes perfect to achieve something and I enjoy trying to improve so not a real problem, just not enough songs from the start.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your review! Well, we are preparing a lot of famous songs, just in the next update we will add: "I love rock'n roll". Thanks a lot for your early support and we will have on mind your suggestion about the unlocked songs when the player start!

reviews.review_description:
Game is fun but not as good as Smash Drums.

Music isn't performed by the original artists which seems a bit misleading (unless I've missed where it states that)

Willing to change my ratings with more content or modes.

developer_response.body: Hello Rocker! There are only 3 songs that are covers. If you look at the credits you can see who their artists are. The rest are with their original artists, including the base game and DLC's, and now others like Green Day are coming. So I hope you can review your review since having a good rating helps us a lot.

reviews.review_title: This game made me love VR again
reviews.review_description: A lot of VR games try to get immerse you and make you feel like your in a world that’s dark and depressing, but this game immerses in you in utter brilliance and enough energy to wipe out Hiroshima.
A amazing game I love guitar hero and drums rock is like guitar hero drums

The game is insanely fun even though there are not a lot of well known songs all the songs are really good and the charts are really fun the only problem is that sometime you feel like you hit a drum but didn’t registered might be only me and the drums are a little bit to far away so you have to calibrate the game to pull the drum closer to you but the game is so fun that it still deserves a 5 star
Smash drums is my favourite drum game, but this is very close behind my number two. Very fun to play, good music and style. I recommended it to every music game lover.
This is the best drum rhythm game I've ever played!
A game with a nostalgic atmosphere of old games,  I love the game style and of course the Rock is all. I hope for iconic bands in a future.
